title: Layered paper texture backgrounds for scrapbook pages
sources: SYNTHESISED — scrapbooking practice; no single PD canonical source
notes: Building a layered background from torn tissue layers, watercolour wash, washi-tape strips, and rubber stamp textures. The order matters: watercolour wash first, tissue layer while still damp (couching effect), dry flat, add tape and stamp details last. Keeps scope on the physical page-making, not the subjects being scrapbooked.
